name: Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail
name_original: Alto Guadalope Enduro — circular desde Allepuz por el Camino de los Pilones
description: This moderate 29.1 miles (46.8 km) mountain biking trail in Maestrazgo Cultural Park offers varied terrain and scenic views.
region_intro: Mountain biking around Allepuz offers routes through rugged mountainous terrain and diverse landscapes. The region is characterized by significant elevation changes, carved by the Sollavientos river, a tributary of the Turia. Riders can explore the unique geological features of the Maestrazgo Geopark, which includes deeply embedded ravines and sharp ridges. This area provides a challenging environment for mountain bikers seeking varied trails. Best mountain bike trails around Allepuz The most popular mountain bike trail is Pico Peñarroya Loop, a 24.1 miles (38.8 km) difficult trail that takes 3 hours 27 minutes to complete. This route features significant elevation gain, ascending towards Alto del Peñarroya. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail, a moderate 35.8 miles (57.6 km) path. This trail navigates varied terrain within the Alto Guadalope area, offering a mix of descents and climbs. Local mountain bikers also love the Pilones Trail – Canyon With Waterfall loop from Allepuz, a 19.4 miles (31.3 km) trail leading through a canyon, often completed in about 2 hours 55 minutes. Mountain biking around Allepuz is defined by rugged mountains, river valleys, and significant elevation changes. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate to difficult. The routes in Allepuz are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 5.0 stars from over 2 reviews. More than 70 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Allepuz's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Allepuz?
A: There are over 35 mountain bike trails around Allepuz, catering to various skill levels. You'll find a good mix, with most routes being moderate, alongside several challenging options and a few easier trails.

Q: What are the most challenging mountain bike trails in the Allepuz area?
A: For experienced riders seeking a challenge, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1003664299/pico-penarroya-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico Peñarroya Loop&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 38.8 km trail with significant elevation gain towards Alto del Peñarroya. Another demanding option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38143980" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gudar Pass – Peñarroya Summit Viewpoint loop from Gúdar&lt;/a&gt;, which covers 32 km with substantial climbing.

Q: Are there any mountain bike routes with waterfalls near Allepuz?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20143417" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pilones Trail – Canyon With Waterfall loop from Allepuz&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 31.3 km route that takes you through a scenic canyon and features a waterfall, offering a refreshing highlight during your ride.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Allepuz?
A: The terrain around Allepuz is predominantly rugged and mountainous, characterized by significant elevation changes. You'll encounter deeply embedded ravines, sharp ridges, and vertical escarpments, especially within the Maestrazgo Geopark. The Sollavientos river valley also contributes to varied landscapes, offering thrilling descents and challenging climbs.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Allepuz?
A: Many of the mountain bike trails around Allepuz are designed as loops. For example, the difficult &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1003664299/pico-penarroya-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico Peñarroya Loop&lt;/a&gt; and the moderate &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20143417" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pilones Trail – Canyon With Waterfall loop from Allepuz&lt;/a&gt; are excellent circular options that bring you back to your starting point.

Q: What natural features or viewpoints can I see while mountain biking in Allepuz?
A: Allepuz is rich in natural beauty. You can enjoy panoramic vistas from numerous landscape viewpoints, especially on routes ascending peaks like Alto del Peñarroya. The region is part of the Maestrazgo Geopark, featuring dramatic geological formations, and the picturesque Sollavientos river valley. The area is also recognized for its rich biodiversity within Sites of Community Interest (LIC) and Special Protection Areas for Birds (ZEPA).

Q: What are some interesting landmarks or attractions near the mountain bike trails?
A: Beyond the natural landscapes, you can explore several points of interest. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5805644" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñarroya Summit and Observation Tower&lt;/a&gt; offers incredible views. You might also encounter historic sites like the Hermitage of Santa Isabel de Sollavientos, or the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5359402" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Alcalá de la Selva Castle&lt;/a&gt;. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5162134" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sierra de Gúdar&lt;/a&gt; itself is a prominent landmark.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Allepuz?
A: The mountain bike routes in Allepuz are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 5.0 stars. Over 70 mountain bikers have explored the varied terrain, often praising the challenging climbs, thrilling descents, and the stunning mountainous landscapes.

Q: Are there any long-distance mountain bike trails around Allepuz?
A: Yes, for those looking for longer rides, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1005405975/alto-guadalope-enduro-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 57.6 km path that navigates varied terrain, offering a substantial ride through the Alto Guadalope area.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Allepuz?
A: Given Allepuz's altitude of 1474 meters and its mountainous terrain, spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant conditions for mountain biking, with milder temperatures. Summers can be warm, and winters may bring snow and cold, especially at higher elevations, making some trails more challenging or inaccessible.

Q: Is Allepuz suitable for beginner mountain bikers?
A: While many trails are moderate to difficult, there are a few easier options available. It's best to check individual route descriptions on komoot for specific difficulty ratings to find trails that match your skill level. The region's rugged nature means even 'easy' trails might have some technical sections.

Q: Are there any specific considerations for mountain biking in the Maestrazgo Geopark?
A: When riding within the Maestrazgo Geopark, be mindful of the unique geological formations, deeply embedded ravines, and sharp ridges. Stay on marked trails to protect the natural environment and ensure your safety. The calcareous soil can also lead to varied trail conditions, so be prepared for different surfaces.
tips: On this road we find a series of pylons, which marked the path of the communication route for the wool trade, in the Middle Ages. A very interesting place that we must visit if we are in the area.

We are in a beautiful town in Teruel where the surroundings of the source of the Guadalope River stand out, where there is a spring. It is also worth visiting the town center, visiting the parish church or the hermitage of Nuestra Señora de Loreto.

faqs.question: What is the terrain like on the Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail?
faqs.answer: The trail offers a diverse mountain biking experience. You can expect mountainous landscapes with varied elevation changes. Sections may feature natural technical singletrack with ruts, rock slabs, and boulders, especially in more arid areas. Other parts might involve climbs on paved roads leading to forest tracks, with descents ranging from flowy sections to more technical, rocky segments.

faqs.question: Where can I park to access the Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail?
faqs.answer: The trail starts near Allepuz. Look for parking options in or around the village, which serves as a common access point for routes in the area. Specific trailhead parking details may vary, so it's advisable to check local signage upon arrival.

faqs.question: What are the best times of year to mountain bike this route?
faqs.answer: The best time to ride the Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail is generally during the spring and autumn months when temperatures are milder. Summer can be quite hot, especially in arid sections, while winter may bring colder weather or even snow at higher elevations, making some parts less accessible or more challenging.

faqs.question: Are permits or entrance fees required for the Maestrazgo Cultural Park, where this trail is located?
faqs.answer: Generally, there are no specific permits or entrance fees required for mountain biking on public trails within the Maestrazgo Cultural Park. However, always respect local regulations and private property. It's good practice to check for any updated local guidelines before your visit.

faqs.question: Is the Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail dog-friendly?
faqs.answer: While many outdoor areas in Spain are dog-friendly, it's always recommended to keep dogs on a leash, especially in natural parks or areas with livestock and wildlife. Ensure your dog is fit enough for the distance and terrain, and always carry water for them.

faqs.question: What points of interest can I see along the route?
faqs.answer: Along the route, you'll encounter interesting spots such as the Pilones Trail, known for its historical significance. You'll also pass through or near the settlement of Villarroya de los Pinares, offering a glimpse into local life and architecture.

faqs.question: Does the trail intersect other well-known paths?
faqs.answer: Yes, while the majority of the route follows the Alto Guadalope Enduro trail (approximately 86%), it also passes through sections of the Camino de los Pilones and Calle Desamparados.

faqs.question: What kind of scenic views can I expect on this enduro trail?
faqs.answer: The trail offers expansive views of mountainous landscapes, including pine forests and potentially desert plains. You can expect natural areas and rock formations, providing panoramic vistas of the surrounding region.

faqs.question: Are there any cafes or pubs near the trail for refreshments?
faqs.answer: Given that the trail passes through or near settlements like Villarroya de los Pinares, you may find local establishments such as cafes or pubs to refuel. It's always a good idea to check opening hours, especially in smaller villages.

faqs.question: What gear should I bring for mountain biking the Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail?
faqs.answer: For this moderate enduro trail, you should bring a well-maintained mountain bike suitable for varied terrain, a helmet, appropriate protective gear, plenty of water, snacks, a repair kit, and navigation tools. Given the potential for technical sections and varied weather, layers of clothing are also recommended.

faqs.question: Is this trail suitable for beginners?
faqs.answer: The Alto Guadalope Enduro Trail is rated as 'moderate' in difficulty. While it offers a fulfilling adventure, it includes varied terrain with technical sections, significant elevation gain, and descents that can be challenging. Beginners with good fitness and some prior mountain biking experience might manage, but it's not ideal for absolute novices.
